products_list.name: 22k Gold Heritage Bangles Set of 2 (Medium-20cm)
products_list.description:
Experience the ultimate expression of luxury and tradition with our 22k Gold Bangle Sets. Crafted from ultra-pure 22k gold, these matching sets radiate a deep, incredibly rich golden glow that has been celebrated for generations. Each set features a uniform, harmonized design, showcasing intricate hand-engraving, brilliant diamond-cut accents, and classic filigree work that creates a stunning texture and sparkle on the wrist.

These curated sets are designed to provide a complete, majestic look for bridal wear, formal cultural celebrations, or special family heirlooms.

Please note: The exact number of bangles included in each specific set is displayed in the product photo.

Material: 22k Solid Yellow Gold
Set Quantity: The number of bangles included in the set is shown in the photo
Craftsmanship: Intricate Middle Eastern hand-detailing and high-polish finish
Occasion: Exquisite for weddings, dowry gifts, formal celebrations, or investment heritage pieces
